lines: Claudia works inside a booth whose admission window has been nailed open.
"Old intake record or new arrival mark? Those are different forms of waiting."

choices.label: Ask when the gates stopped admitting families
Ask what remains below the booth
Leave Claudia with the old forms

lines: "Individual placement replaced household admission before my mother’s time. The booth kept its old sign long enough for families to trust the wrong promise."
"People trusted the sign longer than the policy trusted them."

choices.label: Ask what survived below the booth
Leave Claudia with the old forms

lines: "The undercroft held original rolls beside the exposure ledgers. Spare intake hardware occupied the rear cages."
"The stair was sealed after the lower pipes began answering the condenser out of time."

choices.label: Leave Claudia with the old forms
